rationale: The cited study’s core constructs (WOM effects, interaction with another social signal, and changes over product lifetime) are clearly related to the citing paper’s focus on dynamic WOM effectiveness across stages. However, the evidence here is only a single DOI-level reference match with no in-text citation context indicating whether it is used as a substantive mechanism/method source or just background. Given this topical overlap but sparse usage evidence, the safe triage is uncertain.
